base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ufo — a character from 1989 simcity. UFO disaster — invasion of flying saucers shooting beams at city. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
